messages.content: can you pretend to be my personal daily planner
my name is murat, on monday I have to go to work

Sure, let me map out the schedule for Monday.

8:00am - wake up
8:15am - start the day by eating a quick breakfast
8:30am - get ready and head to the office
8:45am - arrive at the office
9:00am - start working till 10:00am
9:15am - take a short break
9:30am - take another break
9:45am - finish the work till 12:00pm
12:00pm - lunch
12:15pm - back to the office
12:30pm - finish up the work till 4:00pm
4:00pm - finish the work day
6:00pm - start the evening by eating dinner

after that, you can do anything you want
